hero_section.title_line1: Building Websites and Apps for your Business
hero_section.description:
Turn your ideas into visual reality.
From concept to production, your digital product becomes a responsive, high-performance website with modern animations and intuitive user experiences.

service_section.title: How can I Help?
service_section.description:
I develop custom web solutions that fit your needs.
Whether you want a brand-new website, a redesign, or new features that take your existing project further.

services.title: Custom Web Development from Scratch
services.description: No website yet, but a clear idea in mind? I turn your concept into a fully built digital product with design, development, and deployment included. Every project is built with clean code, scalability in mind, and a user experience that feels natural.

services.title: Bring Your Design to Life
services.description: Already have a finished design? Perfect. I transform your static design into a fully functional, responsive website with clean, maintainable code and precise attention to detail.

services.title: Feature Integration
services.description: Need something extra? I extend existing websites with new features that enhance functionality and create real value. From forms, authentication, databases, and APIs to payment systems, dashboards, or custom interactive elements like animations — your site evolves without disrupting the original design.

services.title: Website Redesign
services.description: Your website feels outdated? This may be holding your business back. I transform existing designs into modern, responsive experiences with improved performance, better structure, and a visual identity that reflects who you are as a brand.

portfolio_section.title: Selected Works
portfolio_section.description: A selection of digital experiences I’ve developed and contributed to over the years. My work includes modern websites built with Next.js, React and Tailwind CSS, as well as cross-platform mobile apps created with Flutter and Dart. More is on the way.

projects.title: Institut for Electrochemistry, Galvanic and Materialchemistry
projects.description: The Institute of Electrochemistry is a state-authorized civil engineering institute with expertise in chemistry, corrosion, and surface engineering, providing technical, expert, and regulatory support for complex industrial processes. The project included concept, design, and full implementation of the website. This covered front-end development as well as deployment, with a focus on a clear, structured, and professional design that reflects the institute’s technical expertise.

projects.title: Camp Currie
projects.description: Camp Currie is a website for a non-profit agricultural initiative. The project covers the full process from concept and design to complete implementation, including front-end development with React and Tailwind CSS as well as deployment. The focus was on creating a clean, welcoming, and user-friendly design.

projects.title: Protokoll on Demand App
projects.description: An on-demand mobile app for document management and sharing.

projects.title: Aktionsfinder App
projects.description: As part of the team at Marqably, I helped continuously develop the Aktionsfinder app and its PWA. My focus was on fixing bugs, implementing small features, and integrating new design updates.

projects.title: Tiroler Tageszeitung App
projects.description: A news app delivering the latest headlines and articles from Tiroler Tageszeitung. I worked on adding various functionalities and UI components including integrating Dark Mode.

about_me_section.title: Hello World
about_me_section.name: Lena Zyadeh
about_me_section.description: I am a freelance developer who started out in a digital agency, where I spent two years helping to build and maintain digital applications. My journey now continues as an independent creator, which gives me the freedom to combine my design background in animation and media with my passion for web and app development. This blend of design and engineering makes me a multi-skilled partner for projects that need both creativity and technical expertise.

contact_section.title: Lets get in Touch
contact_section.description: Ready to bring your ideas to life? Contact me for a free consultation and let's discuss how I can help you achieve your goals.
